entry.title: SAP ICC Introducing New Refreshed Framework: Two Paths to Confidence
entry.content:
SAP always enables partners to extend its solutions in ways that foster innovation while preserving the stability of the core system. This rests on four architectural principles that shape how SAP builds solutions and how partners extend them.

  • Cloud-First architecture
  • Clean Core extensibility principle
  • Business AI and intelligent applications
  • Data-driven business operations

SAP Integration and Certification Center (SAP ICC) goal is maintaining ecosystem quality while avoiding disruptive changes that unnecessarily burden partners or customers.

The certification framework is designed to validate that partner applications enhance our value proposition, maintain the technical qualities required for continuous innovation, and align with our strategic direction and below priorities

  • Platform alignment matters
  • Upgrade resilience is essential
  • Standard integration methods

As a partner, if you are looking to extend SAP solutions, integrate your own solution, build a standalone application from scratch, or develop a comprehensive offering embracing SAP technology, the SAP ICC team provides you with the right services.

Two paths to confidence: Integration Certification and Interoperability Review.

To know more please join us at the

In-person events

Location: SAP Labs India - Whitefield, Bengaluru - 560066

Date: 05th February 2026

SAP Partner Meet-up: Driving Innovations Together

Webinar:

  • EMEA/APAC session
    10:00–11:00 CET (UTC+1) → 14:30 IST, 17:00 SGT, 18:00 CST (China), 20:00 AEST
  • NA/LAC session
    12:00–13:00 ET (UTC‑5) → 11:00 CT (MX), 10:00 MT, 09:00 PT, 14:00 BRT

entry.title: Sample value drivers for effective Business Value Realization of your Public Cloud Solution
entry.content:
In this blog, I continue with the topic of Business Value Realization. If you are reading this blog for the first time and you have not read my value series, then I suggest you look at these two blogs first to understand the full concept of value realization using the help of SAP for Me for SAP Public Cloud Solutions: Drive more Business Value out of your SAP Public Cloud Solution Subscriptions and SAP for Me – Adoption Report – Drive More Business Value Realization.

Here, I would like to focus on a simple example of how an SAP Cloud ERP (SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition) live customer can start with a quick, comprehensive analysis to add more business outcomes using some of the value drivers SAP provides in SAP for Me, with a high number of solution capabilities for SAP Cloud ERP.

Now, keep in mind these value drivers are not the only ones you can use, but I want to recommend them to you based on my experience and the fact they will help you improve multiple areas.

So for my example, I will use an SAP Cloud ERP customer utilizing finance, sales, procurement, logistics, and manufacturing.

Now, to simplify the analysis and example, I will only focus on two value drivers for the following improvement areas to make a comprehensive analysis:

  • Reduce selling, general, and administrative expenses
  • Increase revenue
  • Decrease cost of goods sold (COGS)
  • Improve working capital
  • Improve pre-tax margin

Sample value drivers by improvement area

Now, with these value drivers, I can go back to SAP for Me and use the Customer Insight Dashboard Cloud Functional Usage under the Business Value section to look at the solution areas my business can adapt to impact these value drivers more and bring greater business outcomes to your organization.

Let’s start looking at lowering our selling, general, and administrative expenses. Notice that after adding the value drivers “Reduce account receivable management costs” and “Reduce invoice error rate,” SAP for Me displays these results.

SAP for Me – Customer Insights Dashboard – Cloud Functional Usage – Business Value

Value Driver Selection - SAP for Me – Customer Insights Dashboard – Cloud Functional Usage – Business Value

Selling, general, and administrative expenses - “Reduce account receivable management costs” and “Reduce invoice error rate” value drivers

The customer is using 4 solution capabilities out of 10.

Solutions capabilities for selected value drivers in selling, general and administrative expenses.

Our customer has an opportunity to activate and use a total of 6 additional solution capabilities. Of course, as previously discussed in my blogs, customers can compare the unused solution capabilities with the industry peer group to be more focused on the activation. All this information can be reached via SAP for Me.

Moving now to the Increase Revenue area and the value drivers “Reduce manufacturing cycle time” and “Reduce revenue loss due to fulfillment Issues,” SAP for Me displays the results.

Revenue - “Reduce manufacturing cycle time” and “Reduce revenue loss due to fulfillment Issues” value drivers

The customer is using 12 solution capabilities out of 15.

Solutions capabilities for selected value drivers in revenue

The customer has an opportunity to activate and use a total of 3 additional solution capabilities.  

Within the Decreased Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) section, you’ll notice that when value drivers like “Reduce total manufacturing costs” and “Reduce asset maintenance cost” are added, SAP for Me displays the corresponding results.

Cost of goods sold - “Reduce total manufacturing costs” and “Reduce asset maintenance cost” value drivers

The customer is using 10 solution capabilities out of 15.

Solutions capabilities for selected value drivers in cost of goods sold

The customer has an opportunity to activate and use a total of 5 additional solution capabilities.

When you add the value drivers "Reduce sales days outstanding" and "Reduce days in inventory" to improve the Working Capital area, SAP for Me displays the resulting outcomes.

Working capital – “Reduce sales days outstanding" and "Reduce days in inventory" value drivers

The customer is using 13 solution capabilities out of 30.

Solutions capabilities for selected value drivers in working capital

The customer has an opportunity to activate and use a total of 17 additional solution capabilities.

If you add the value drivers of “Improved on-time delivery” and “Reduce uncollectible accounts receivable write-offs”, SAP for Me shows the following results for improving the Pre-Tax Margin area.

Pre-Tax Margin - “Improved on-time delivery” and “Reduce uncollectible accounts receivable write-offs” value drivers

The customer is using 20 solution capabilities out of 35.

Solutions capabilities for selected value drivers in pre-tax margin

The customer has an opportunity to activate and use a total of 15 additional solution capabilities.

Now, summing it all up, to create a comprehensive analysis on additional value realization, here is the final view using the recommended value driver by improvement area. As you can see from the graphic, the yellow area provides us with an additional opportunity for value creation using solution capabilities currently not used, which can bring new improvements and impact the value drivers.

Additional opportunity for value creation in selected improvement areas

Now, realistically speaking, implementing all these solution capabilities can be arduous, so here I recommend thinking about adding another strategy, such as filtering by benchmarking with your industry peers, to truly reduce the scope and only select the ones that are proven to be heavily used by your industry peers. If you would like to see how to do this, refer to my previous blog "Drive more Business Value out of your SAP Public Cloud Solution Subscriptions."

Now, this example can also apply to other public cloud subscriptions like SAP SuccessFactors, SAP Integrated Business Planning, etc., so feel free to play with the value drivers included in SAP for Me to find the areas of improvement you want to drive for your business.

Keep in mind that solution capabilities are expanding from traditional functional scope to also include SAP Business AI, so SAP will continue to add more in this area. As in my previous blogs, remember, this is not the only tool that can be used; SAP has other tools such as SAP Signavio, SAP WalkMe, SAP LeanIX, SAP Value Lifecycle Manager, and/or SAP Cloud ALM that can be used in tandem to help drive more business value from your SAP subscription.

I encourage you to discuss these points with your SAP Customer Success Manager, SAP Account Executive, or SAP Partner. They may be able to provide you with additional recommendations and guidance.

Your insights and opinions are valuable, so please don't hesitate to contribute by commenting on this blog.

Follow us via @SAP and #S4HANA or follow @Marco_Valencia (SAP Business Suite Customer Success Management).

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition：高级外币评估 (Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation)
entry.content:
业务背景

在业务上，我们都了解到大部分企业或多或少都会发生一些外币交易，那么随着货币汇率的不断波动，为了在期末能够按照即期汇率出具更准确的本位币报表或者集团货币报表就需要执行外币评估。在以前的On-Premise系统时代，大家普遍使用的是经典外币评估系统功能去实现这一业务需求，但步入云ERP系统时代后，随着并行会计核算和多币种会计核算方案的推出，经典外币评估方案就显示出一些明显的瓶颈，于是SAP在近几年推出了高级评估解决方案。

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 系统在前几年推出的高级评估解决方案中包括了“过账长期资产和负债的贴现”，“高级外币评估”，“过账基于信用风险的减值”和“过账资产负债表重新分类”四部分功能，本文旨在系统介绍高级评估解决方案中的“高级外币评估”功能。与经典外币评估相比，高级外币评估带来以下显著变化和优势：

支持并行会计核算（UPA – Universal Parallel Accounting）

支持多币种会计核算，例如功能货币，公司代码货币和集团货币

在会计报表版本中应用语义标记（Semantic Tags）概念和功能

支持直接过账至原始科目，包括未清项管理科目和统御科目

 

系统配置

激活高级评估

Activate Advanced Valuation (SSCUI 103315)

所有SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition新配置（provisioning）系统都默认激活高级评估，一旦系统存在过账数据后不得再取消激活高级评估。

 

定义用于在总账流程中确定科目分配的规则

Define Rules for Determining Account Assignments in G/L Processes (SSCUI 104827)

该配置路径中SAP预设置的配置内容不能新增，更改和删除。但您可以创建和复制自定义的科目分配规则。

 

将科目分配规则分配到高级评估

Assign Account Assignment Rules to Advanced Valuations (SSCUI 104826)

 

定义高级外币估值的规则

Define Rules for Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation (SSCUI 105450)

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition系统中默认交付了以下2个评估规则。您也可以在此配置路径中创建自定义外币评估规则，并应用符合您业务需求的评估方法。

SKDV – 关键日期外币估值：默认应用始终评估（ALWAYS_VALUATE）的评估方法。

STDV – 时间相关外币估值：默认应用德国会计现代化法案（DE_BILMOG_VALUATE）的评估方法。即对于剩余期限少于1年的所有当前未清项目采用ALWAYS_VALUATE方法；对于剩余期限大于1年的非当前项目采用STRICTLY_LOWEST_VALUE（严格最低价值原则）方法。

 

在这一配置页面可以设置执行高级外币评估的汇率类型和评估方法。

 

在这一配置页面可以设置执行高级外币评估的语义标记。您也可以新增自定义语义标记后将其添加为执行高级外币评估的前提条件。

 

在这一配置页面可以设置执行高级外币评估的汇兑损益过账科目。

 

将外币估值规则分配到会计准则

Assign Rules for Foreign Currency Valuation to Accounting Principles (SSCUI 105451)

 

分配财务报表版本到会计准则

Assign Financial Statement Versions to Accounting Principles (SSCUI 103215)

这一配置将财务报表版本分配至会计准则，后续系统会按照分配的财务报表版本执行高级外币评估。

 

管理全局层次结构

Manage Global Hierarchies (F2918)

这一配置将执行高级外币评估的语义标记分配至具体的科目，包括统驭科目和总账科目。

 

经典评估补充配置

如果您还在使用经典会计报表版本配置，且未能将会计报表版本迁移至全局层次结构，请补充参考以下配置清单来完成高级外币评估的系统设置：

定义会计报表版本 Define Financial Statement Versions (SSCUI 102669)

分配财务报表版本到会计准则 Assign Financial Statement Versions to Accounting Principles (SSCUI 103215)

将语义标记分配到财务报表版本 Assign Semantic Tags to Financial Statement Versions (SSCUI 102659)

 

总结

综上所述，高级外币评估重新设计了其整个配置模型，拥有完全不同的配置路径，其配置逻辑大致为：评估规则 > 语义标记 > 财务报表版本 > 会计准则 > 评估规则。更多配置信息请参考 SAP Help Portal 高级外币评估的配置要求检查清单 和 SAP KBA 3219200 - How to Post Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation。

 

功能演示

维护期末汇率

系统应用：货币汇率 (F3616)

 

执行高级外币评估

系统应用：计划总账作业 (F1927)

高级外币评估需要分账套和公司代码执行。如果公司代码数量较多，为减少人工操作，建议创建重复运行作业。动态日历年度/期间“选项为创建重复作业提供可能性。当创建重复运行作业时，通常需要设置“动态日历年度/期间“，例如“本月最后一天”等选项，您也可以根据业务需求创建自定义动态日期选项。自定义动态日期选项请参考Fiori 应用“管理日期函数 (F2595A)” 相关功能。

 

显示高级外币运行结果

系统应用：分析关账运行结果 (F3753)

测试运行

高级外币评估有其默认的分组规则，如下图所示，未清项管理科目按照“日记账分录编号/会计年度/行项目编号/币种”分组；非未清项管理科目，如果是现金科目，则按照“开户行/开户行账户/币种”分组，如果不是现金科目，则以“科目编号”作为分组的标准之一。

 

正式运行

 

查看日记账分录

系统应用：管理日记账分录 (F0717A)

高级外币评估支持过账至原科目，无论其是否为统驭科目。按照下图显示，以供应商统驭科目 (K)的原始过账为例，虽然由高级外币评估触发过账至原统驭科目，但其科目类型已由供应商统驭科目 (K) 转换为总账科目 (S) ，且该科目依然会带有供应商信息。

 

基于本文的测试用例，高级外币评估将从交易货币 (00) 至公司代码货币 (10) 的外币评估定义为直接评估。不同系统的具体情况取决于系统中的货币设置，相关配置路径是“定义分类账和公司代码的货币设置”(SSCUI 103379)。

 

高级外币评估引入重新计量评估概念。基于本文的测试用例高级外币评估将从公司代码货币 (10) 至集团货币 (30) 的外币评估定义为重新计量评估。不同系统的具体情况取决于系统中的货币设置，相关配置路径是“定义分类账和公司代码的货币设置”(SSCUI 103379)。

 

区别于之前的经典外币评估，高级外币评估新增支持功能货币的外币评估。高级外币评估使用凭证货币对功能货币进行评估。如果尚未定义功能货币，则对公司代码货币进行评估。

 

经典评估VS 高级评估

基于前文内容，我们已经知道高级外币评估在系统功能方面相较于以前大家所熟知的经典评估有着许多大的变化。首先是运行方式的彻底改变，高级外币评估采用作业运行的方式实现，这缓解了对程序在线运行性能的要求；其次是报表显示的显著优化，以前的经典评估只能查看事实运行的结果，而高级外币评估得益于作业运行方式的实现，可以保留其历史运行结果，以便后续查看，且基于Fiori技术开发的报表，其用户体验也有较大提升；最后是评估逻辑的巨大变化，高级外币评估只采用增量评估的方式过账，对行项目级别数据进行评估，引入重新计量评估，过账至原始科目，且支持功能货币评估等。接下来，我们来简单总结一下经典外币评估和高级外币评估的差异内容：

 

经典评估

高级评估

系统应用是执行外币评估 (FAGL_FCV)

系统应用是计划总账作业 (F1927)

选择画面参数复杂

选择画面参数简单

基于评估范围和会计准则执行过账

基于分类账和会计准则执行过账

手工选择需要评估的科目

通过语义标记选择需要评估的科目

支持冲销评估和增量评估

仅支持增量评估

在科目余额层面汇总评估

对行项目数据进行评估

除汇兑损益科目外，统一过账至调整科目

除汇兑损益科目外，统一过账至原科目

通过配置基于货币类型进行评估

引入重新计量评估，默认对并行货币进行评估

不支持功能货币评估

支持功能货币评估

自动带出固定格式的抬头文本

日记账分录无抬头文本

自动带出所有行项目的固定格式项目文本

仅原科目过账自动带出固定格式项目文本

可通过配置更改外币评估的日记账分录类型

只能通过专家配置更改外币评估的日记账分录类型

支持重估应付暂估 (GR/IR) 科目

不支持重估税科目和应付暂估 (GR/IR) 科目

支持税科目重估 (SAP KBA 1589419)

不支持税科目重估

 

更多高级评估的限制请参考 SAP KBA 3290794 -Restrictions for Advanced Valuation in Financial Accounting Jobs in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition。

截止到2026年12月SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 系统中的经典评估相关功能依然可用，但还是建议客户尽快在新的财年开始之初执行系统功能切换。经典评估功能的具体弃用时间表请参考：3686385 - Deprecation Timeline for Classic Foreign Currency Valuation functionality in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: 面向 SAP ERP 公有云、SAP IBP、SAP Marketing Cloud 用户的提醒：出站“默认客户端证书”CA 将变更为 SAP Cloud Root CA
entry.content:
背景与原因

  • 受行业规范变化（由 Google 推动）影响，主流证书颁发机构将停止签发用于客户端认证的证书。当前为 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition、SAP IBP、SAP Marketing Cloud 租户签发“默认客户端证书”的 DigiCert  也将停止相关签发。
  • 为确保持续可用，SAP 将把“默认客户端证书”的签发 CA 切换为 SAP Cloud Root CA 。自 2026 年 3 月起，新签发的客户端证书将由 SAP Cloud Root CA 颁发，并在后续的常规证书轮换中逐步替换现有证书。

谁需要关注与行动

  • 如果您在 S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition、IBP 或 SAP Marketing Cloud 的出站集成中使用“默认客户端证书”进行认证（即由您的租户调用目标系统），本次变更适用且需要您在目标系统执行调整。
  • 仅涉及客户自管的集成场景；SAP 管理的场景由 SAP 处理。

本次变更的具体内容

  • 证书“issuer（颁发者）”从 DigiCert Global G2 TLS RSA SHA256 2020 CA1 变更为 SAP Cloud Root CA。
  • 证书“subject（主题）”将新增 OU 字段，OU 的值为签发该证书的 BTP Certificate Service 的子账户 ID。
  • 证书链相应更换为 SAP Cloud Root CA 体系。部分场景中证书扩展用途可能调整为仅客户端认证（Client Authentication）。

时间线与通知方式

  • 自 2026 年 3 月下旬起，新开系统将直接获得由 SAP Cloud Root CA 签发的默认客户端证书；存量系统将按既有到期轮换节奏完成切换（不进行“集中大迁移”）。部分租户可能在 2 月下旬进入证书准备或分阶段发布过程。
  • 您现有的证书在其到期日前仍然有效；切换发生在下一次证书轮换时。示例：若当前证书有效期至 2026 年 4 月，则变更在 4 月轮换时生效；若至 11 月，则 11 月再切换。
  • 与以往一致，SAP 将通过邮件通知证书轮换；您也可在源租户的 Maintain Client Certificates 应用查看证书有效期与使用处。

如果不更新，会有什么影响？

若不更新目标系统配置，可能出现两类问题：

  • CA 信任失败：目标系统未信任 SAP Cloud Root CA，mTLS 握手在 TLS 层直接失败（通常无 HTTP 状态码）。
  • 身份映射错误：目标系统依赖证书主题/颁发者做用户或系统身份映射，未更新映射会导致 401/403 等授权错误，或因实现差异出现 TLS 错误。

您需要做什么（行动清单）

       1. 在目标系统更新 CA 信任

  • 将 SAP Cloud Root CA 的根证书导入目标系统的信任库（trust store）。可从 SAP Trust Center 获取 SAP Cloud Root CA 根证书。

       2. 切换到新的“默认客户端证书”

  • 参考源租户的 Maintain Client Certificates 应用，在证书轮换发生后，将出站通信用户/连接凭据从旧证书切换到新证书（与以往轮换操作一致）。
  • 若目标为 BTP 服务实例，请在对应服务绑定/服务密钥中引用新证书；最简做法是基于新证书重建绑定/密钥。原“用户映射”在 BTP 中表现为“系统映射”，同样需更新。

       3. 更新身份映射逻辑

  • 针对目标系统中基于证书 subject/issuer 的用户或系统映射，调整为使用新证书的元数据（包含新的 OU 与新的 issuer）。

       4. 使用证书钉扎（pinning）的环境

  • 若目标系统采用证书指纹钉扎，不涉及 CA 信任；在轮换时直接替换为新证书指纹即可。但这类环境每次证书轮换都需更新指纹。

如何定位“所有受影响的目标系统”

  • 在源租户打开 维护客户端证书（Maintain Client Certificates） 应用。
  • 选择 SAP 管理的“客户端缺省值（Client Default）”证书。
  • 在“通信系统”区域查看该证书被使用的所有通信系统列表。
  • 点击进入具体通信系统，在“出站通信的用户（Users for Outbound Communication）”中查看认证方式：
    • 若为“SSL客户端证书（SSL Certificate）”，在“常规（General）”下查看目标系统主机并在该系统完成信任与映射更新。
    • 若为“OAuth 2.0（mTLS）”，该证书用于向 OAuth 令牌提供者的 mTLS 端点认证，应在令牌提供者侧更新；端点位置可在“OAuth 2.0 Settings -> Outbound OAuth 2.0 Client Settings”查看。

常见问答与提示

  • 是否会集中切换？不会。切换随各租户证书到期的常规轮换进行。
  • 旧证书是否马上失效？不会，旧证书在到期前有效。
  • 新根证书来源？从 SAP Trust Center 下载 SAP Cloud Root CA 根证书。
  • SAP 会发邮件吗？会，轮换通知邮件将包含 CA 变更说明；请按指引在目标系统完成信任与映射更新。

支持与文档资源

您可以阅读以下文档，获取更多详细信息：

  • SAP Note 3677763 - Change of Client Certificate "Client Default" in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, SAP IBP, and SAP Marketing Cloud - SAP for Me
  • Don't Let Your Integration Take a Coffee Break: Cl... - SAP Community
  • How to Handle Default Client Certificate Renewal
  • Set Up Certificate-to-User Mapping (SAP Cloud Integration and SAP Marketing Cloud)
  • Client Certificate Authentication for Integration Flow Processing (SAP Integration Suite)
  • Client Certificate Authentication for API Clients (SAP Integration Suite)
  • 如遇问题，请按产品提交事件：XX-S4C-OPR-INC（S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition）、SCM-IBP-OPS-INC（SAP IBP）、CEC-MKT-ITC（SAP Marketing Cloud）

结语

对使用“默认客户端证书”的客户而言，本次 CA 变更是一次必要的合规升级。只要您在目标系统及时导入 SAP Cloud Root CA 根证书、切换到新客户端证书并更新身份映射，出站集成即可平稳度过“轮换窗口”，避免握手失败或授权错误。

entry.title: Professional Services in SAP Cloud ERP 2602
entry.content:
Welcome to your 2026 updates for the Professional Services industry, here you can learn and share knowledge about SAP's ready-to-run public cloud ERP software solution.  

In this blog post I’d like to outline the innovations for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2602 in the area of Professional Services. These are the topics that are covered:

  • Intercompany cost allocations reconciliation review booklet (16T, 4AN) 
  • View custom fields in the billing elements list of the Manage Project Billing app (4E9) 
  • Enablement of time and expense billing without open billing plan item (4E9) 
  • Archival of Project Billing data (4E9) 
  • Seamless access to Preliminary Billing Document apps on creation of Project Down Payment Request (4E9) 
  • Improving usability for projects managers to adjust internal projects within professional service projects (J11)
  • Project staffing view for Resource Managers (6JO)
  • Ability to find resources across resource organizations (6JO)
  • Custom content in Resource Management apps (6JO)

Here you can have a look at the three top highlights of this release for the professional services industry here:

Intercompany cost allocations reconciliation review booklet (16T, 4AN) 

Reconciling intercompany costs is a common challenge that can complicate period-end closing. To provide complete transparency, we have delivered the "Intercompany Cost Allocations Reconciliation" review booklet. This powerful report gives the delivering company a comprehensive, step-by-step view of the entire resource-related intercompany billing process. It bridges the gap between the initial cost (the CO journal entry) and the internal billing document, clearly highlighting any unbilled items. With the 2602 release, the report is further enhanced to trace the process all the way to the corresponding FI journal entry on the receiving company's books, allowing you to quickly identify and close any reconciliation gaps.

 

This was also a request raised by customers on our Customer Influence Portal, which was resolved with this delivery: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/285049

Have a look at this demo to get a better understanding of the system: 

 

Please also have a look at Thorsten Seegers blog, he is the product manager experts of this topic.

For even more details, please have a look at the entry of this topic on SAP Help Portal.

 

Next let's get to the topics we have this release in the project billing area.

Please remember that Andreas Hammerschmidt updates his detailed blog “Project Billing for Customer Projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud” with every release, so you can find a comprehensive overview of the functionality there.

 

View custom fields in the billing elements list of the Manage Project Billing app (4E9) 

To make truly informed billing decisions, you need the full context. We've enhanced the "Manage Project Billing" app to provide just that. Imagine your business uses custom fields on sales orders to track critical data like a "Project Priority Code," "Geographic Region," or a "Contractual Milestone ID." Now, you can add these fields as columns directly in your billing worklist. This simple change has a powerful impact: you can now sort your billing elements by priority to ensure high-value items are processed first, or filter by region to manage tax-specific requirements. This brings essential data to the forefront early in the process, reducing the need to cross-reference information and helping you prevent billing errors before they happen.

Have a look at this demo to get a better understanding of the system: 

For even more details, please have a look at the entry of this topic on SAP Help Portal.

 

Enablement of time and expense billing without open billing plan item (4E9) 

Your ability to generate cash flow shouldn't be held up by administrative hurdles. To accelerate your time-to-bill, we've introduced a major flexibility enhancement for Time and Expense or Usage-Based billing. Consider a scenario where ad-hoc consulting work is completed and time is recorded, but a specific billing plan item for that exact period doesn't exist yet. Instead of waiting for a plan to be created, billing specialists can now immediately create a Billing Document Request for this work. The system intelligently handles the backend process by automatically generating a new billing plan item with a due date set to the current date. This ad-hoc billing capability, enabled via a feature toggle, ensures that you can invoice for completed work the moment it's ready, directly improving your cash flow.

Have a look at this demo to get a better understanding of the system: 

For even more details, please have a look at the entry of this topic on SAP Help Portal.

 

Archival of Project Billing data (4E9) 

 Maintaining a lean, high-performing system is crucial for long-term operational excellence. To support this, we've expanded our data archiving capabilities. When a sales order tied to a customer project is closed and archived, the system now intelligently archives all associated Project Billing data along with it. This ensures that the complete historical record of a project is stored together in a secure, accessible archive. For system administrators, this means a reduced data footprint and better application performance. For compliance and auditing, this provides a clear and complete trail. An auditor-role user can easily view the count of archived entries, and the application log provides full transparency, confirming exactly which project billing requests were archived as part of the process.

Have a look at this demo to get a better understanding of the system: 

For even more details, please have a look at the entry of this topic on SAP Help Portal.

 

Seamless access to Preliminary Billing Document apps on creation of Project Down Payment Request (4E9) 

A smooth workflow is a fast workflow. We've optimized the process for creating project down payment requests to eliminate unnecessary steps and keep you moving. Previously, after submitting a down payment request, the confirmation dialog would only link to the billing document app. This created a disjointed experience, forcing you to manually navigate to other apps to continue your work. With the 2602 release, the success dialog has been enhanced. It now includes direct navigation links to both the "Create Preliminary Billing Document" and "Manage Preliminary Billing Documents - Services" apps. This means you can flow from one logical task to the next without interruption, saving clicks and maintaining your focus.

Have a look at this demo to get a better understanding of the system: 

For even more details, please have a look at the entry of this topic on SAP Help Portal.

 

Improving usability for projects managers to adjust internal projects within professional service projects (J11)

A great user experience is paramount. We've rolled out several enhancements to make project administration more intuitive and flexible. This includes new, streamlined Fiori apps like "Manage Projects – Professional Services Projects" for creating internal projects and "Manage Work Packages" for maintaining work-package demands. We've also listened to your feedback to provide more flexibility. You can now assign a resource to a project responsibility even if their work agreement starts in the future, allowing for better forward planning. Furthermore, the Project Control app now provides a complete financial picture by displaying all related Purchase Orders and Purchase Requisitions, giving you a single source of truth for all project commitments. This flexibility even extends to how you find information, as you can now edit certain SAP-delivered search models and publish them to your catalog, tailoring the search experience to your team's needs

Have a look at this demo to get a better understanding of the system: 

For even more details, please have a look at these two entries for this topic on SAP Help Portal

 

Project staffing view for Resource Managers (6JO)

Effective resource management requires a bird's-eye view of project needs. The new "Manage Request Assignments" app delivers exactly that. It provides resource managers with a consolidated, project-centric dashboard showing all resource requests and their assignment status. Instead of digging into individual requests, you can now see the entire staffing picture for a project at a weekly or monthly level. This makes it easy to spot upcoming resource shortfalls or identify overstaffed areas at a glance. From this central view, you can directly navigate to the "Staff Resource Request" or "Manage Resource Utilization" apps to make proactive adjustments, ensuring optimal staffing across your entire project portfolio.

Have a look at this demo to get a better understanding of the system: 

For even more details, please have a look at the entry of this topic on SAP Help Portal.

 

Ability to find resources across resource organizations (6JO)

In a global or matrixed organization, talent can be anywhere. Our latest update breaks down internal silos to help you find the best person for the job, regardless of their home department. Resource Managers can now use the new "Resource Organization" filter in the "Staff Resource Requests" app. This powerful filter allows you to expand your search and view matching resources from multiple resource organizations you are authorized to access. The results will clearly display the "Resource Organization" for each candidate, empowering you to build the best possible project team by tapping into a wider, more diverse internal talent pool.

Have a look at this demo to get a better understanding of the system: 

 

Custom content in Resource Management apps (6JO)

We understand that every business has unique data needs for making staffing decisions. To accommodate this, you can now add custom sections and content to Resource Management apps using our built-in UI extensibility tools. For example, you could add a custom section to the Resource Request page to display an employee's "Security Clearance Level," "Industry Certifications," or "Language Skills." This ensures that all critical decision-making information is available in one place. This level of customization is supported by our robust framework, which includes a library of released CDS views like `I_LglCntntMCntntTypeTxtAPI01` (Document Content Type - Text), giving your developers stable, SAP-approved objects to build upon.

 

More Information

If you are interested in the latest and greatest blog posts on Professional Services, please have a look at my collection blog  and also take a look at the Community page for Professional Services .

 

Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!   

From January 12-16, we hosted a series of 22 expert-led live sessions to highlight the exciting innovations shipped with the SAP Cloud ERP 2602 release. Missed the live sessions? We've got you covered! Take advantage of the entire series or pick and choose the sessions most relevant to you. You will find the recording and presentation for Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management as well as 21 other topics of interest. Don't miss this chance and watch them on demand – anywhere, anytime.

 

Find All of Our Assets   

We at Cloud ERP Product Success offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.title: 专业服务-外部员工服务采购
entry.content:
业务需求

外部员工在以服务为中心的行业中发挥着重要作用，SAP S/4HANA Cloud公有云为专业服务场景中的客户项目提供了两种采购这些外部临时员工的方式，基于项目或者基于成本中心。本博文介绍案例基于项目的采购外部员工服务。

参考博文

英文博文：External Contingent Workforce for Customer Project... - SAP Community

前提配置

1.APP:管理劳动力，创建外部员工，员工类型选择：BBP005，字段临时工填写对应采购订单的供应商比如10300001。

创建工作协议

进入详细页面，设置服务级别

2.物料主数据

由于DEMO DATA只安装与初始系统中，所以请参考初始系统来创建对应的主数据，以物料T001为例，注意：物料组请默认设定P001，不能选择自定义物料组。

3.配置点：Define expense (101306)，完成需要用到的科目分配

4.APP:管理成本要素组

5.配置点：maintain billing profile(103637)

系统实现

1.创建客户项目

详细请参考博文：专业服务端到端最佳业务实践介绍 - SAP Community

注意：团队角色T001对应采购订单的物料

案例选择固定价格开票类型

转到APP：检查客户项目

2.创建采购订单

在采购订单行项目里，注意以下：

  • 物料选择T001对应客户项目里的角色
  • 科目分配类型选择项目(P)
  • 服务执行者，这里对应管理劳动力外部员工Z00002的前置配置点
  • 总账科目自动带出
  • 增加字段WBS元素，并且维护WBS

收货选项默认勾上，不能去掉。调整执行日期，这个时间段决定了你做报工的时间段。然后保存采购订单3.APP: 发送缺少时间通知（Notify Missing Time），对外部员工做人天报工审批报工

当报工审批后，系统会自动对采购订单进行收货，并且生成Service Entry Sheet。

4.回到APP: 检查客户项目，查看实际成本5.后续对采购订单做发票和销售开票，这里不进行演示。

多谢观看

entry.title: Onward Replication of Business Partner master data in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Introduction

In SAP landscapes, Business Partner data consistency across systems is critical for smooth business operations. With growing hybrid system landscapes – especially involving SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public and Private Editions – data replication has become more complex.

This blog explains the current challenges with Business Partner SOAP/Web Services, the workarounds used today, and how Onward Replication in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition provides a future-ready solution for seamless data distribution. This blog is co-written with @Karunaharan.

 

Current Situation in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

In the current setup, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition typically participates in point-to-point data replication. In this setup, the system is capable of only point-to-point replication, meaning it acts as a sender or receiver of master data with one connected system at a time. 

For example, consider three systems: 

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 
  • SAP Cloud for Customer (C4C)
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

Currently: 

  • When master data is created or changed in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, it is replicated to both C4C and  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. 
  • But when master data is created or changed in C4C, it is replicated only to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. 
  • Since SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is treated only as a receiver in this setup, it does not send the C4C changes further to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition.

 

Common Issues

  • No automatic onward replication.
  • Additional integration logic required.
  • Manual handling increases error risk.
  • Data consistency is harder to maintain across systems.                                                                 

Workarounds Used Today

To overcome these limitations, customers often implement custom workarounds.

Typical Workaround:

Business data from C4C is sent to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition via the SAP Integration Suite middleware. Once C4C receives confirmation, the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system triggers an OData call to enable a custom flag, which triggers replication to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition.

Drawbacks of Workarounds

  • Increased development and maintenance effort
  • Custom logic is hard to scale
  • Higher chances of data inconsistencies
  • Not aligned with SAP’s clean core strategy

 

The Solution: Onward Replication in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

SAP addresses these challenges with Onward Replication, allowing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to act as a data forwarding system.

What Is Onward Replication?

Onward Replication enables forwarding of Business Partner data from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to multiple target systems as soon as the data is received or created. This feature is available starting from the 2602 release of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Activating Onward Replication for Business Partner

Onward Replication is disabled by default. It must be enabled via a dedicated configuration activity.

Typical Workflow

  1. Define target systems for replication
  2. Access the configuration activity in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  3. Enable Onward Replication for Business Partner
  4. Monitor replication status via standard tools

Once activated, SAP handles the forwarding - no custom flags or middleware logic required.

Key Features and Improvements

Onward replication brings several benefits to SAP landscapes:

  • Data Forwarding
    Ensures business partner data reaches all required systems
  • Real-Time Consistency
    Keeps master data aligned across systems
  • Optimal Performance
    Reduces duplicate processing and custom logic
  • Reduced Manual Effort
    Eliminates workaround-based development
  • Support for Multiple Targets
    One source, many consumers

 

Practical Example :

  • Business Partner is created in C4C
  • Data reaches SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition replicates the same data to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

With Onward Replication enabled:

  • The business partner object is created once.
  • The system forwards it to all configured target systems.
  • No additional integration steps or custom triggers are needed.

 

From Point-to-Point Integration to Hub-Like Model

With the 2602 release of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the system evolves from a point-to-point replication framework into a central hub:

  • Acts as a master data distribution centre
  • Seamlessly integrates with multiple SAP and non-SAP systems
  • Supports SAP’s long-term cloud and clean core strategy

This shift significantly simplifies enterprise-wide master data governance.

 

Conclusion

Onward Replication is a game-changing capability for Business Partner data management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. It eliminates complex workarounds, reduces integration effort, and ensures real-time data consistency across systems.

For SAP consultants, developers, and business users, enabling Onward Replication is a crucial step toward a simpler, scalable, and future-ready SAP integration architecture.

entry.title: What’s New in SAP Central Business Configuration 2509 FD2 with SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2602
entry.content:
With the latest release of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, an exciting new feature is available in SAP Central Business Configuration. This blog post will provide you with a concise overview.

Streamlined Cloud Warehouse Assignment

With the availability of the 2602 release of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the Set Up Organizational Structure app in SAP Central Business Configuration supports cloud warehouse assignment for inventory-managed storage locations. If warehouse management is part of your scope, you can now assign a cloud warehouse also to the following standard storage locations:

  • Standard Storage Location for Finished Goods
  • Standard Storage Location for Semi-Finished Goods
  • Standard Storage Location Raw Material
  • Standard Storage Location Return

This gives you greater flexibility in setting up your organizational structure.

Assigned cloud warehouse in the Set Up Organizational Structure app

For a quick summary, check out this video about What's New in 2509 FD2. Don’t forget to also use the What’s New Viewer on the SAP Help Portal, which provides further details and links about all the recent changes.

That wraps up the new features this time. Did you like this blog? If so, please leave us a thumbs up at the top. Also, make sure to follow the SAP Central Business Configuration tag or follow this dedicated blog collection to stay up to date with the latest blog posts.

Do you have any ideas on how to further enhance SAP Central Business Configuration? Go to the Customer Influence platform to submit an improvement request or vote for the ideas of others. This helps us understand your requirements even better and prioritize our work accordingly. We’re looking forward to your improvement requests.
